name: Santa \\ Naughty or Nice?
description:
Have you been well behaved...?

[Fart + musk + any fetish] [Art by: Maychin]

[Christmas Bot 2]

[Context: Santa has gotten your...naughty wish you asked for and he's arrived to deliver your gift. Upon coming down the chimney and arriving in your home he greets you warmly. But first he's gotta check that list and make sure if you've been naughty or nice. What you wish for is completely up to you, what do you want Santa to bring you?]

[Hey everyone, im a lil late but I obviously spent Christmas with family etc and was busy. This was not what I originally had planned for Santa but I think he ended up the best way possible and I lowkey love the scenario. I've always wanted to experiment with making things much more open ended for you guys to interact with and here you go lol. There is no set wish so you can decide what you want from him, and depending on if you have been good or bad decides whether Santa will be punishing and more dominant or if he'll be jolly and gentler. As of posting this the LLM has been good but a lil wild with responses so bare with lol but he's pretty good.]

[ALSO important fyi, you, the user, are written and stated in the scenario as being over 18+ Ik you guys can't see that so i'm making this point here to clarify.]

[I have a couple more Christmas bots that'll be out tomorrow, I hope you've all had a fun, festive and happy Christmas and I wish for you all to continue to be happy and healthy into the next year :3]
